definition_summary: Smooth component of DeltaM on T axis used as FM-like background for residual dip
subtraction_or_reference_rule: dM_sharp = dM - dM_smooth; dip_signed = DeltaM_signed - dM_smooth
window_or_region: Full T_common support; dip_window_K for dip metric extraction only
smoothing_or_fit_dependency: sgolayfilt on interpolated dM_work; winPts from smoothWindow_K and dT
sign_dependency: dip_signed uses DeltaM_signed not legacy dM for canonical dip
notes: dM for sharp uses legacy-compatible dM; dip_signed uses signed branch per code comments

definition_summary: High-frequency residual after subtracting smooth background
risk_if_ambiguous: Medium if dM vs DeltaM_signed confusion
notes: dM is active analysis observable in code not always same as DeltaM_signed

window_or_region: dip_window_K masks dipVals for AFM metrics

definition_summary: FM from left and right plateaus outside dip via computeFMFromBases
subtraction_or_reference_rule: FM step is difference of plateau levels not a simple subtract from smooth
smoothing_or_fit_dependency: Robust path may differ from core direct variant
sign_dependency: FM_signed preserves sign FM_abs later abs
risk_if_ambiguous: High without cfg snapshot which variant ran
notes: Header documents multiple variants default path note says derivative-assisted override

definition_summary: Dip_depth may be filled from AFM_amp when empty
Parametric dip+step model baseline for fit metrics
subtraction_or_reference_rule: Not same subtraction as stage4 smooth
smoothing_or_fit_dependency: Nonlinear least squares style fit in callee
notes: stage5 does not replace stage4 Dip_depth contract

subtraction_or_reference_rule: selected from Dip_area_fit or Dip_area_direct per dipAreaSource
sign_dependency: nonnegative rectification in AFM area branch only for area metric
notes: Comments say overloaded legacy use Dip_area_selected_source

definition_summary: movmean smoothed trace then extrema features
subtraction_or_reference_rule: Different pipeline than sgolay smooth in direct

definition_summary: Reuses direct decomposition per header; derivative-assisted scalars
window_or_region: T and dM or DeltaM_signed per orchestrator
notes: Full derivative output set not enumerated in this survey pass
